name: oracle-chamber
summary: A round chamber where an oracle speaks — steam, smoke, and strange vapors rise from a central pit or font. Supplicants stand beyond a ring; the seer sits or stands above the fume.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: round — the chamber's circularity is central to the rite

accent.purpose: an inner ring around the vapor source

primary_palette.note: a steaming cleft in the floor ringed by three or more pillars
a seer's chair before a great scrying sphere
a scrying basin warded by stones at compass points
smoke-divination — stools set around the smoking brazier for supplicants

story_prompts: the oracle mid-utterance — vapor thick, seer's head thrown back, supplicants frozen
the oracle gone missing — chair empty, vapor still rising, prophecies half-scrawled on the wall
supplicants waiting — a queue of frightened nobles, the oracle not yet arrived
the chamber has gone silent for years — the vapor source cold, the last prophecy still chalked above the pit
a false oracle — mechanisms beneath the pit, a pipe channeling steam from a hidden furnace

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: hazy and dim (0.2-0.3) — smoke and vapor diffuse the light; cold or greenish tint

anti_patterns: the focus (pit, ball, font) sits at the geometric center — radial symmetry
no pews or seating rows — supplicants stand or kneel at the ring
never square off the room with corners full of props; the circularity is the magic
